name: Chocolate Chip Tea Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cold sour cream (regular or low-fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch loaf pan.
3. In a large heavy saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter, stirring occasionally until it's half melted. Remove from heat and stir until fully melted.
4. Stir in the sugar, vanilla, salt, sour cream, and egg. Add the baking soda and baking powder in pinches, breaking up any lumps with your fingers. Stir thoroughly.
5. Stir in the flour just until blended, then fold in the chocolate chips.
6. Pour batter into the pan and scrape to ensure even distribution.
7. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a tester inserted in the middle comes out with just a crumb clinging to it.
8. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes. Remove from the pan and cool on the rack for about 15 more minutes.
